topic: Harry Kane's World Cup knockout drought with England kicks off against Croatia

youtube_title: Harry Kane: 61 Goals, Zero World Cup Knockout Contributions — England Starts Tonight
youtube_description:
Harry Kane just had a 61-goal season for Bayern Munich. He's England's all-time top scorer. But in two World Cups, he's never scored from a quarter-final onward. Tonight against Croatia, England's golden generation begins its campaign. Can Kane finally break his knockout curse?

#FIFAWorldCup2026 #England #HarryKane #ThreeLions #WorldCup
instagram_caption: 61 goals this season. Zero World Cup knockouts. Tonight changes everything. 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 Convince me England's different this time — I'll be in the replies.
